---
title: "Home"
---

::: hero-section
# MC Research Methods: Open Methods Hub

**Bridging Data Science and Creative Communication**

Learn to design, execute, and communicate original research in mass media.
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Welcome to the Course

MC 451 teaches you to think like a researcher: ask precise questions, design rigorous studies, and present your findings as both a professional report and a live website. Over five phases, you'll build a complete content analysis from scratch — qualitative immersion through quantitative testing — using real media data.

**Reference Textbook:** [From Vibes to Variables (2nd Edition)](https://sim-lab-siue.github.io/vibes-to-variables/)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Quick Start

::::: card-grid
::: card
[Setup]{.card-icon}

### New Student? Start Here

Complete your workspace setup and download your Methods Vault (15 minutes).

[Get Started](setup.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg}
:::

::: card
[Syllabus]{.card-icon}

### View Syllabus

Review course policies, the 17-week schedule, and grading information.

[Read Syllabus](syllabus.qmd){.btn .btn-secondary}
:::
:::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## The Five Phases

| Phase | Title | Weeks | Points | Focus |
|-------|-------|-------|--------|-------|
| **I** | **The Journalist** | 1–4 | 150 | Reading journals, critical thinking, GitHub setup |
| **II** | **The Architect** | 2–4 | 125 | Software setup, archive research, project planning |
| **III** | **The Builder** | 5–12 | 250 | Ethics, theory, codebook, sampling, pilot testing |
| **IV** | **The Analyst** | 13–15 | 225 | R programming: wrangling, visualization, inference |
| **V** | **The Publisher** | 16–17 | 250 | Final web portfolio: PDF + GitHub Pages |

[Start Phase I](modules/01_journalist/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Course Information

**Instructor:** Dr. Alex P. Leith
**Meeting Times:** MW 3:00–4:15 PM
**Office Hours:** MW 10:00–11:30 AM and 1:30–3:00 PM (or by appointment)
**Office:** Dunham Hall 1017

[View Full Syllabus](syllabus.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}

::: callout-info
**Ready to dive in?** Start with the [Setup Guide](setup.qmd) — it takes about 15 minutes to configure your workspace and download your Methods Vault.
:::
